name: Low-Fat Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the water, pear baby food, egg whites, salt, bread flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, nonfat dry milk, yeast, honey, brown sugar, and cinnamon. Mix until well combined.
2. Place dough in a greased bread machine pan or similar container as recommended by the manufacturer. Follow the manufacturer's instructions for the dough cycle.
3. When the dough cycle is complete, turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. If needed, add more flour to make the dough easy to handle. Let rise for 15 minutes.
4. Roll the dough into a rectangle measuring approximately 14 by 10 inches. Brush the dough with honey and evenly sprinkle with brown sugar, cinnamon, raisins, and nuts.
5. Starting at one long end, roll the dough tightly and seal the ends. Cut into 8 equal pieces and place cut side up in a greased 9-inch round cake pan or an 11 by 7 inch baking pan.
6. Cover the rolls loosely and let rise until doubled in size, about 30-45 minutes.
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through. Remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack. Drizzle with powdered sugar icing.
